'''鈭歯-dh-t''' ('''kanadhat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knuckle|knuckle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knuckle|knuckle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanadhat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadhat|thinadhat]] || [[word:jinadhat|jinadhat]] || [[word:shinadhat|shinadhat]] || [[word:kinadhat|kinadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadhat|thuthunadhat]] || [[word:jujunadhat|jujunadhat]] || [[word:shushunadhat|shushunadhat]] || [[word:kukunadhat|kukunadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadhat|thunadhat]] || [[word:junadhat|junadhat]] || [[word:shunadhat|shunadhat]] || [[word:kunadhat|kunadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadhat|thunadhat]] || [[word:junadhat|junadhat]] || [[word:shunadhat|shunadhat]] || [[word:kunadhat|kunadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadhat|thenadhat]] || [[word:jenadhat|jenadhat]] || [[word:shenadhat|shenadhat]] || [[word:kenadhat|kenadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadhat|thothonadhat]] || [[word:jojonadhat|jojonadhat]] || [[word:shoshonadhat|shoshonadhat]] || [[word:kokonadhat|kokonadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhat|thonadhat]] || [[word:jonadhat|jonadhat]] || [[word:shonadhat|shonadhat]] || [[word:konadhat|konadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhat|thonadhat]] || [[word:jonadhat|jonadhat]] || [[word:shonadhat|shonadhat]] || [[word:konadhat|konadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nadhat|th忙nadhat]] || [[word:j忙nadhat|j忙nadhat]] || [[word:sh忙nadhat|sh忙nadhat]] || [[word:k忙nadhat|k忙nadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadhat|thathanadhat]] || [[word:jajanadhat|jajanadhat]] || [[word:shashanadhat|shashanadhat]] || [[word:kakanadhat|kakanadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadhat|thanadhat]] || [[word:janadhat|janadhat]] || [[word:shanadhat|shanadhat]] || [[word:kanadhat|kanadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadhat|thanadhat]] || [[word:janadhat|janadhat]] || [[word:shanadhat|shanadhat]] || [[word:kanadhat|kanadhat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanadhat|shanadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanadhat|goshanadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanadhat|gokishanadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanadhatn眉|shanadhatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkn眉|goshanadhatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhatn眉|gokishanadhatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanadhatsh毛|shanadhatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanadhatnksh毛|goshanadhatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanadhatsh毛|gokishanadhatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhatro|shanadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkro|goshanadhatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhatro|gokishanadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhatmu|shanadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkmu|goshanadhatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhatmu|gokishanadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanadhatsher|shanadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanadhatnksher|goshanadhatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanadhatsher|gokishanadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanadhatng|shanadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkng|goshanadhatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanadhatng|gokishanadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanadhatya|shanadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkya|goshanadhatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanadhatya|gokishanadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanadhatyam|shanadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkyam|goshanadhatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanadhatyam|gokishanadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhatn眉sh毛|shanadhatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkn眉sh毛|goshanadhatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhatn眉sh毛|gokishanadhatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhatn眉ro|shanadhatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkn眉ro|goshanadhatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhatn眉ro|gokishanadhatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhatn眉mu|shanadhatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkn眉mu|goshanadhatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhatn眉mu|gokishanadhatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhatsh毛n眉|shanadhatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhatnksh毛n眉|goshanadhatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhatsh毛n眉|gokishanadhatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhatsh毛ro|shanadhatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhatnksh毛ro|goshanadhatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhatsh毛ro|gokishanadhatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhatsh毛mu|shanadhatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhatnksh毛mu|goshanadhatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhatsh毛mu|gokishanadhatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhatron眉|shanadhatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkron眉|goshanadhatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhatron眉|gokishanadhatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhatrosh毛|shanadhatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkrosh毛|goshanadhatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhatrosh毛|gokishanadhatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhatromu|shanadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkromu|goshanadhatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhatromu|gokishanadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhatmun眉|shanadhatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkmun眉|goshanadhatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhatmun眉|gokishanadhatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhatmush毛|shanadhatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkmush毛|goshanadhatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhatmush毛|gokishanadhatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhatmuro|shanadhatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhatnkmuro|goshanadhatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhatmuro|gokishanadhatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
